creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Mark Millard from comment #5)

I should have mentioned some about the context that I used (both for amd64 and armv6):

# uname -apKU
FreeBSD FreeBSDx64 11.0-BETA3 FreeBSD 11.0-BETA3 #1 r303469M: Fri Jul 29 03:54:43 PDT 2016     markmi@FreeBSDx64:/usr/obj/clang/amd64.amd64/usr/src/sys/GENERIC-NODBG  amd64 amd64 1100120 1100120

# uname -apKU
FreeBSD rpi2 11.0-BETA3 FreeBSD 11.0-BETA3 #2 r303469M: Fri Jul 29 19:09:12 PDT 2016     markmi@FreeBSDx64:/usr/obj/clang/arm.armv6/usr/src/sys/RPI2-NODBG  arm 
armv6 1100120 1100120
